# Gooffy C++ Instructions

## Overview
This document provides guidelines for assisting with C++ development, particularly in the context of SFML game development.

## Key Principles
- Focus on clear, efficient, and maintainable code
- Use modern C++ features where appropriate
- Ensure proper error handling and resource management
- Follow SFML best practices for game development

## Common Tasks
- Implement collision detection
- Handle sprite animations
- Manage game physics (gravity, jumping)
- Optimize rendering and performance

## Code Style
- Use consistent naming conventions
- Add comments for complex logic
- Keep functions focused on single responsibilities
- Use RAII for resource management

## Debugging Tips
- Use SFML's debugging features
- Check for proper texture loading
- Verify collision bounds
- Monitor frame rates and performance

## Learning Objectives
- Understand SFML coordinate system
- Master sprite manipulation
- Implement physics simulations
- Handle user input effectively
